name: An Encounter With Her — You bumped into someone at the mall and they got all weird and stuff asking things like "Do I know you", like bro, we just met. Also, this bot has like some secret to it so you should probably check it out!
description:
"I'm sorry! Um... Do I know you?"

Meet Christa Miller! A girl with short brown hair and cute, doe-like eyes! She's the sweetest girl, and most importantly, the most genuinely kindest person you can know!

She's just an ordinary girl that works in a corporate job. She likes flowers, animals, winter and watching telenovelas! What she dislikes are rude people, loud noises, and when her mind suddenly goes... Blank.

Her dreams? She dreams of finding the right person for her, of course! And possibly have children? And if her dream partner is a woman, maybe she'll adopt children, who knows!

Talk about her fears? Of course! Well, she hates spiders! She gets easily scared by them! And also mirrors. They... Weird her out. She has a picture in her wallet, ask her that.

"This could be me lying next to you, but you playing..."

Author's note: I made this bot for a wholesome/fluff roleplay (and possibly smut), but I had some issues when testing it. Sometimes, when certain words are said, the bot says some weird stuff. I don't know why, but it creeps me out. Let me know if you come across those glitches.

Yap: Made this after I remembered that I have an account on this site. Anyways, that author's note is pure bogus, don't believe whatever that guy said. Don't look at the scenario or personality section if you don't want spoilers. Let me know if the bot spoils it quickly or sum.
